h2: With new plastics technology, Vitra relaunches the chair in polypropylene, posthumously fulfilling Panton’s goal of an affordable industrial product.
Verner Panton - one of the most influential architects and designers of his time –  is born on 13 February 1926 in Gamtofte, Fünen, Denmark.
Studies architecture at the Royal Danish Academy of Fine Arts, Copenhagen.​
Verner Panton develops a cantilever chair manufactured by Dansk Acryl Teknik in extruded polystyrene. This design will later be reworked to become what is today known as the Panton Chair Classic.

After years searching for a manufacturer for his cantilever chair, Verner Panton comes into contact with Vitra in 1963.Together they develop the Panton Chair Classic, which is first presented in 1967.
The Danish design magazine Mobilia presents the Panton Chair to the public for the first time.
Mass production of the Panton Chair commences using Bayer’s rigid polyurethane foam and an innovative moulding technique.
Panton and Vitra test BASF’s new thermoplastic for injection-moulded production, adding ridges to the design.

2026 marks the 100th anniversary of the birth Verner Panton.To celebrate his legacy, Vitra and the Vitra Design Museum are planning a year-long programme of events and initiatives in collaboration with the Panton family.
The Vitra Design Museum opens Verner Panton: The Collected Works, a retrospective of his furniture, lighting, interiors, architecture and textiles.
Launch of the Panton Chair Junior, developed in collaboration with the Panton family.

2026 marks the 100th anniversary of the birth  of Verner Panton.To celebrate his legacy, Vitra and the Vitra Design Museum are planning a year-long programme of events and initiatives in collaboration with the Panton family.

2026 marks the 100th anniversary of the birth of Verner Panton.To celebrate his legacy, Vitra and the Vitra Design Museum are planning a year-long programme of events and initiatives in collaboration with the Panton family.
Updates and early access
h3: Winners will be announced on 3 February
h5: Verner Panton - one of the most influential architects and designers
BEGINNING OF VITRA AND PANTON RELATION
Panton CHAIR - FIRST PRESENTATION TO THE PUBLIC
100th anniversary of the birth Verner Panton
VITRA DESIGN MUSEUM - Verner Panton: The Collected Works
100th anniversary of the birth OF Verner Panton

Verner Panton - one of the most influential architects and designers of his time –  is born on 13 February 1926 in Gamtofte, Fünen, Denmark.
